name: Frutta Al Forno Con Amaretti (Baked Fruit)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut peaches in half from stem to root end. Do not peel them.
2. Twist each peach to free the pit.
3. Place peach halves, cut side up, in a 10-inch well-buttered baking dish.
4. Combine remaining ingredients: Amaretto liqueur, butter, egg yolk, brown sugar, macaroons, and chopped almonds.
5. Beat the mixture with a fork until well blended.
6. Stuff each peach hollow with the almond mixture.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 20 minutes, or until the peaches are soft but still hold their shape.
8. Serve warm.
This can also be done with pears, apricots, nectarines, or apples. All are very good.
